flavorText: Eldritch Knights blend martial discipline with arcane study to become heavily armored battle mages.

features.description: You are a one-third caster who uses Intelligence for your fighter spells, drawing from the wizard spell list with a focus on Abjuration and Evocation spells.
You bond with up to two weapons. You can summon a bonded weapon to your hand as a bonus action, and you cannot be disarmed of a bonded weapon unless incapacitated.
When you cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.
When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, that creature has disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.
When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
When you cast a spell using your action, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

eldritch-knight-spellcasting.summary: Blend fighter fundamentals with a restricted wizard spell package built for protection, control, and combat rhythm.

eldritch-knight-weapon-bond.summary: Bonded weapons resist disarm pressure and can be recalled when you need them back in hand.

eldritch-knight-war-magic.summary: Keep weapon pressure online during cantrip turns so the subclass plays like a real battle-mage.

eldritch-knight-eldritch-strike.summary: A weapon hit softens the target for the save-based spell you land next.

eldritch-knight-arcane-charge.summary: Action Surge now doubles as an aggressive reposition tool, letting you burst and appear where it hurts most.

eldritch-knight-improved-war-magic.summary: Cast real spells and still keep steel in the same round, completing the subclass loop.
